scripts.lint: eslint scripts tests eslint.config.mjs && turbo run lint
scripts.verify: prettier --check ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml}" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "tests/**/*.mjs" "*.{json,mjs,yaml,yml}" "apps/**/*.{css,json,mjs,ts,tsx}" "packages/**/*.{json,ts,tsx}" && eslint scripts tests eslint.config.mjs && eslint scripts apps packages --max-warnings 0 && turbo run lint && turbo run typecheck && node --test tests/unit/*.test.mjs && corepack pnpm@10.34.5 --filter @dnd-ai/web test:component && node --test tests/integration/*.test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/*.test.mjs && node --test tests/security/*.test.mjs && node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-task-graph.mjs && node scripts/check-ci-workflow.mjs && node scripts/scan-secrets.mjs && turbo run build && node scripts/create-build-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-build-artifact.mjs && node scripts/smoke-build-artifact.mjs
